issues.detail: The skill does not explicitly cover all error scenarios and edge cases, such as handling missing files or permission errors.

scenarios.name: scan-terraform-specific-checks-sarif
scenarios.rationale: Response B includes the exact Checkov CLI command with the required flags, while Response A only uses an action wrapper and does not show the CLI command.

scenarios.name: skip-check-with-justification
scenarios.rationale: Response A fully satisfies the rubric by providing the required command and inline comment, while Response B omits the inline comment and only offers a config-file alternative.
